payload.summary_1line: Round 1 ran successfully with status ok, but it achieved delta_ler of 0.0 and the confidence interval fields were missing. The model used 724148544 FLOPs per syndrome and 253377 parameters, so compute cost is substantial without a measured gain over the classical baseline. No previous summary was provided, so there is no prior-round delta to compare.
payload.next_hypothesis_seed: Try reducing message-passing depth or swapping to a lighter gating/normalization variant to recover positive delta_ler without increasing FLOPs.
